title: NEW LOOSE BASED FLUTED EDGE NON-STICK FLAN TRAY TART QUICHE BAKING TIN 22cm RSW
features: Versatile Baking: Perfect for Tarts and Quiches
Durable Aluminium Construction with Non-Stick Coating
description: Elevate your baking with our premium, round Aluminium Non-Stick Fluted Edge Flan Tray. Measuring 22cm, it's perfect for creating delicious tarts and quiches. This modern, black baking tin is not only stylish but also highly functional. It's oven-safe up to 400°F (200°C) and dishwasher safe for easy cleaning. Ideal for various occasions, including birthdays, weddings, and holidays.
